ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the app */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the app has received */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app */,
  "installs" TEXT /* Number of installs the app has */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the app (e.g., Free, Paid) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content rating of the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the app was last updated */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the app */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Minimum Android version required for the app */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the developers table */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the app was initially released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the app */,
  "screenshots" TEXT /* URLs of the app's screenshots */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's icon */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's promotional video */,
  "iap" INTEGER /* Whether the app offers in-app purchases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_content_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("content_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table to support subcategories */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_genres" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_ratings" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "rating_date")
)
